theme: Range statistics — 9:30 candle vs full RTH session
method: For each RTH session: openRange = 9:30-9:45 H-L; dayRange = 9:30-16:00 H-L. Compute means and bucket the open/day ratio.
key_finding: The 9:30 candle averages ~109 NQ points, ~39% of the full RTH range. Roughly 2/3 of days, the opening 15 min establishes 25-50% of the day's eventual range. About 19% of days the open is bigger than half the day's range (open dominates). Only 2.24% of days does the 9:30 candle alone make up 75%+ of the day's range — those are extreme low-volatility post-open days.
